# PR Status Monitor - LLM Agent Guide

## Extension Overview
VS Code extension that monitors GitHub pull request CI statuses in real-time, displays them in the status bar, and sends notifications on status changes.

## Key Features
- Real-time PR CI/CD status monitoring
- GitHub Actions + Commit status integration
- Desktop notifications for status changes
- Copilot Chat integration for build failure diagnostics
- Multi-repository support
- Support for multiple repositories and git worktrees

## Tech Stack
- **Language**: TypeScript (5.9+)
- **Runtime**: VS Code Extension Host (Node.js)
- **Build**: esbuild
- **Package Manager**: pnpm
- **Testing**: Mocha + @vscode/test-cli
- **Linting**: ESLint (flat config)
- **API Client**: @octokit/rest

## Project Structure
```
src/
  extension.ts     - Activation, polling loop, status bar, notifications
  notifications.ts - Copilot Chat integration
  utils.ts         - Pure functions (status logic, formatting)
  types.ts         - TypeScript interfaces
  test/            - Unit tests

Configuration
  .vscodeignore         - Files excluded from VSIX package
  eslint.config.mjs     - Flat ESLint config
  esbuild.js            - Build script
  tsconfig.json         - TypeScript config
```

## Core Algorithms

### PR Status Determination
Priority-based aggregation:
1. Any failure/error → 🔴 Red
2. Any pending → 🟠 Yellow
3. All passed → 🟢 Green

Checks both GitHub Actions (check runs) + Commit Statuses, filtering out code review checks.

## Build & Development
```bash
pnpm compile      # Type-check + lint + build
pnpm watch        # Watch mode for development
pnpm test         # Run test suite
pnpm build        # Package as .vsix
pnpm publish      # Publish to VS Code Marketplace
```

## For LLM Agents: Key Files to Analyze
1. `src/extension.ts` - Entry point, understand polling + notification flow
2. `src/utils.ts` - Status determination logic
3. `src/types.ts` - Data structure definitions
4. `.github/copilot-instructions.md` - Coding conventions

- Marketplace: https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=ah584d.pr-status-monitor
